content.rendered:
Join us for a tweet chat on January 16 at 12pm EST to discuss nonprofit tech trends in the new year! Nonprofit Tech for Good will be co-hosting a tweet chat with Wired Impact to lead a discussion on nonprofit tech trends, such as website design, social media fundraising, email marketing, privacy, and web accessibility.

How to Participate

At 12pm EST on January 16, participate or follow the discussion on Twitter at #nptech19:

  1. Ask questions or share relevant information during the tweet chat by using the hashtag, #nptech19.
  2. Reply to comments and questions posted during the tweet chat to share your thoughts or ask follow-up questions.
  3. Retweet what you’d like to share with your followers.

RSVP

Please RSVP for the tweet chat on Facebook to let us know that you’ll be joining us on January 16th.

Get an Email Reminder

Sign up for an email reminder for the #nptech19 tweet chat from Wired Impact. You’ll receive it on the morning of the chat as a reminder to tune in.
